category_sources: Official Limine README describes it as a portable multiprotocol bootloader and boot manager.
source_facts.description says modern, advanced, portable, multiprotocol bootloader and boot manager.
display_name_sources: Official repository README and source_facts.name identify the project as Limine.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and links project documentation files for configuration and protocol details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/Limine-Bootloader/Limine; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists boot protocols including Linux, Limine, Multiboot, and chainloading.
source_facts.description identifies a multiprotocol bootloader and boot manager.
